bench.prompt: You are completing a repository-wide Go refactoring task. Work only through the ago tools. Workflow: ago_search with a name fragment to find exact symbol addresses, ago_refs to see every usage, ago_rename to rename a symbol everywhere, ago_set_body to change a function body. Renames of a naming family need one ago_rename per symbol. Mutations are validated by the compiler; a rejection tells you exactly what to fix, adjust and retry.
